a.xlink:title: equals to be used in tests. Prints both operatorans on failure
Compares two Eigen::MatrixBase for equality up to tolerance.
Sets input and output meshes carrying data to be mapped.
Returns true, if computeMapping() has been called.
Computes the mapping coefficients from the in- and output mesh.
Maps input data to output data from input mesh to output mesh.
Sets the coordinates of the vertex.
Returns the coordinates of the vertex.
Returns the constraint (consistent/conservative) of the mapping.
Returns the pointer to boost::geometry::rtree for the given mesh vertices.
Stops an event and commit it. If it's already stopped it has no effect.
Returns the only instance (singleton) of the EventRegistry class.
Returns how many values have been accumulated.
